channel.title: Quiz on Caius Theory
channel.description: Recent content in Quiz on Caius Theory
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License

item.title: Musical Quiz
item.description:
Using only song titles from ONE ARTIST, cleverly answer these questions. Try not to repeat a song title. It’s harder than you think.

Pick Your Artist:
Alanis Morissette
Describe yourself:
So-Called Chaos
If you could go anywhere, where would you go?:
edge of evolution
Your favourite form of transportation:
Head over Feet
Your best friend is:
Ironic
What’s the weather like?:
Limbo no More
If your life was a TV show, what would it be called?:
Citizen of the Planet
What is life to you?:
Madness
What is the best advice you have to give?:
You Learn
If you could change your name, what would it be?:
Not The Doctor
Your favourite food is:
Utopia
Thought for the Day:
Giggling Again For No Reason
How would you like to die?
havoc
Your motto:
Incomplete
